hypotheses.statement: replay 007 raw value is a packed handle misused as index
hypotheses.evidence: reported value 269035851 exceeds 14-bit entity index; bounded component is 10571; independent packet scan did not prove handle semantics

hypotheses.statement: replay 007 packet-entity bit cursor is desynchronized
hypotheses.evidence: production reported a value outside entity-index bounds, but the exact first bit disagreement remains unresolved

hypotheses.statement: replay 007 error instrumentation reports the wrong field
hypotheses.evidence: independent envelope scan did not reproduce the production lookup value before serializer-dependent decoding

hypotheses.statement: replay 007 and 008 share missing prior entity creation
replay 007 and 008 depend on an unprocessed initial snapshot
hypotheses.evidence: delta base semantics and exact initial snapshot ownership are not exposed by current diagnostics

hypotheses.statement: solo-bot demos begin from a delta state without full registry population
hypotheses.evidence: both solo-bot controls fail while same-build normal replay completes; precise shared mechanism is not confirmed

hypotheses.statement: parser mishandles bot-mode sign-on or state refresh
hypotheses.evidence: mode association is supported, but replay 007 and 008 failure signatures differ

hypotheses.statement: bot-controller entities use a lifecycle path absent in normal matches
hypotheses.evidence: class/serializer semantic identity was not available before both failures
replay_008=missing_entity_leave; replay_006 was missing_entity_update, so equivalence is not supported by normalized signature

hypotheses.statement: replay 007 and replay 008 are unrelated failures
replay 009 proves build 23916427 is generally supported
hypotheses.evidence: same-build normal human replay completed with default parser

hypotheses.statement: quit termination is irrelevant because replay 008 fails before termination
hypotheses.evidence: replay_008 first failure tick 3480; match termination occurs later by user metadata
